title: Find My Device - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify "Allow While Using App" location permission flow for Find My Device feature, including popup options, icon visibility, and consent persistence after restart.
expected: After step 3, a location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow". After step 4, Location and Geo icons are visible. After restart with "Allow while using app" selected, user is not asked for consent again.
